domain: scientific instruments, spectroscopy/optics mounts, vacuum lab hardware, sample handling, and precision lab fixtures

ideas.product_context: Optical spectroscopy beamline alignment for steering a laser into a monochromator or interferometer.
ideas.core_function: Provides fine angular adjustment of a front mirror pad through three-point kinematic support and elastic flexure compliance.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined monolithic flexure plate with mirror pocket, thin hinge webs, actuator contact pads, and rear mounting bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines thin flexures, offset bosses, counterbores, mirror recesses, actuator pads, symmetry, and tight clearances in one mechanically meaningful part.

ideas.idea_title: Vacuum Flange Optical Window Clamp Ring
ideas.product_context: High-vacuum spectroscopy chamber with a removable fused silica or sapphire viewport.
ideas.core_function: Compresses an optical window and gasket evenly against a vacuum flange while preserving a clear optical aperture.
ideas.likely_main_part: Annular clamp ring with bolt circle, stepped window recess, gasket groove, relief chamfers, and alignment notches.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concentric circular features, annular grooves, bolt-pattern repetition, stepped profiles, aperture constraints, and sealing-surface geometry.

ideas.product_context: Low-temperature optical or Raman spectroscopy stage for holding a small crystal, wafer coupon, or thin sample.
ideas.core_function: Secures a sample paddle thermally and mechanically while allowing optical access from multiple angles.
ideas.likely_main_part: Small machined copper sample holder with pocket, clamp screw bosses, thermal strap tabs, alignment slot, and beveled optical clearance faces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires mixed small-scale features, asymmetric cutouts, angled reliefs, threaded-boss placement, and material-driven functional geometry.

ideas.product_context: Spectrometer input optics where a fiber ferrule must be aligned to a collimating lens barrel.
ideas.core_function: Locates a fiber ferrule and cylindrical lens housing on a shared optical axis with clamp access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Rectangular alignment block with precision V-groove, lens bore, split-clamp slit, cross holes, dowel pin holes, and datum feet.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests V-shaped prismatic cuts, coaxial bores, clamp slots, orthogonal fastener holes, datum surfaces, and alignment-critical relationships.

ideas.product_context: Lab vacuum chamber carrying electrical or optical feedthrough connectors near a spectroscopy sample stage.
ideas.core_function: Supports a circular feedthrough body and routes strain-relieved cables without interfering with nearby chamber hardware.
ideas.likely_main_part: L-shaped machined bracket with circular saddle, split clamp ears, mounting slots, cable relief channel, and lightening pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes bracket orthogonality, partial cylindrical seats, slotted holes, clamp ears, internal pockets, and cable-clearance geometry.

ideas.product_context: UV-visible spectroscopy accessory for presenting multiple square cuvettes to a fixed optical beam.
ideas.core_function: Holds several cuvettes at indexed angular positions while exposing each optical path through clear side windows.
ideas.likely_main_part: Circular carousel plate with square cuvette pockets, radial optical windows, center bearing bore, detent holes, and engraved index flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests polar arrays, square pockets on a circular part, radial windows, central bearing geometry, detent features, and repeated but orientation-sensitive cutouts.

ideas.product_context: Entrance or exit slit assembly for a monochromator, spectrograph, or beam-shaping optical instrument.
ideas.core_function: Carries one precision slit blade and allows controlled linear motion relative to an opposing blade.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined jaw carrier with blade ledge, screw slots, guide rail grooves, spring pocket, datum shoulder, and blade clamp holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin ledges, long guide features, precision shoulders, nested pockets, elongated slots, and part geometry tied to motion constraints.

ideas.product_context: Vacuum-compatible optical inspection chamber using a microscope objective mounted through a custom adapter.
ideas.core_function: Positions an objective lens at a fixed working distance while sealing or shielding the chamber interface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical adapter body with external flange, internal stepped bore, thread relief, O-ring groove, spanner flats, and vent holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines rotational geometry, stepped internal cavities, sealing grooves, flats on cylinders, radial holes, and optical working-distance constraints.

ideas.product_context: Compact vertical positioning fixture for raising a sample holder or small optical element under a beam path.
ideas.core_function: Transfers screw-driven motion into guided vertical movement while maintaining parallelism and load support.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined crosshead block with lead screw nut pocket, twin guide-rod bores, top mounting grid, underside clearance pocket, and anti-rotation keyway.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests parallel bore alignment, central pocketing, grid-pattern mounting holes, internal clearances, guide constraints, and load-path-driven shape.

ideas.idea_title: Quartz Tube Furnace Sample Boat Fixture
ideas.product_context: Tube furnace or in-situ spectroscopy setup where a ceramic or metal sample boat must be repeatably positioned inside a quartz tube.
ideas.core_function: Cradles and locates a sample boat while allowing gas flow and thermal expansion clearance.
ideas.likely_main_part: Long narrow machined fixture rail with curved tube-contact feet, boat locating tabs, vent slots, end stop, and thermocouple clip boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests elongated proportions, curved support surfaces, thin tabs, slot arrays, asymmetric end features, and functional clearances for thermal and gas-flow behavior.
